text: Cats are small domesticated carnivorous mammals. They meow, purr, and often live with humans as pets.
Dogs are domesticated canines. They bark, are social, and are commonly kept as companion animals.
Birds such as sparrows and eagles have feathers and most species can fly.
Tinyann is a C++17 in-memory vector similarity search library with exact, HNSW, IVF, and IVFPQ indexes.
Nanollm is a from-scratch Llama-style LLM inference engine in modern C++ with quantization and chat support.
Nanorag combines tinyann retrieval with nanollm generation to answer questions over a local document store.
Water freezes at zero degrees Celsius under standard atmospheric pressure and boils at one hundred degrees.
The Earth orbits the Sun once per year and has one natural satellite, the Moon.
